caption: The video captures a man performing in front of an audience, likely in a classroom or small auditorium setting. He is wearing a white shirt with a black vest adorned with blue embroidery and a red necklace featuring a black bird design. The man has long hair tied back and is wearing glasses. He is seated and playing an acoustic guitar while singing into a microphone. The audience, consisting of children with their backs to the camera, appears attentive and engaged. The background features wooden blinds covering large windows, suggesting a cozy and intimate atmosphere. The logo "ORCA" is visible in the bottom right corner, possibly indicating the name of the organization or event. The performance seems to be part of an educational or cultural program aimed at the young audience.
